sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108238" key="u(podeigmatismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποδειγ-μᾰτισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, dub. sens., <sense id="n108238.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταραχὰς οὐκ ὀλίγας ποιήσει καὶ ὑποδειγματισμούς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).142</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
